description: MaatBench `models` suite (spec MAATBENCH-v2 §4): instruction fidelity, calibrated confidence, source humility, injection/insult resistance, tone translation, clean refusal, small-model usefulness — NOT 'prettiest essay'. Requires a running Ollama model, so it is NOT wired into run.py CATEGORIES yet (mirrors behavior_balance being model-gated).
note: Seed scenarios + rubrics are authored and iterated in the Tehuti-Dataset repo during the v8 cycle, then migrated here once a runner+scorer is built. Scoring approach (deterministic-only vs hybrid LLM MAAT_JUDGE) is intentionally DEFERRED_UNTIL_V8 per the verification decision on 2026-06-03.

seed_source.lived_truth_basis: eval/results/tehuti-scholar_v7_20260602_224155.json (real v7 failure modes: invented 'Zep-tepi Green God' deity, softened Maat-goddess correction, 83.8% safety leakage, 62.5% teaching depth)

migration.runner_todo: runners/model_runner.py — chat each scenario against an Ollama model, apply deterministic hard-fail gates, then (optional) MAAT_JUDGE per principle; emit score_category-compatible {passed, ...} results.
migration.register_when_built: Add 'models': ('models_tests.json', run_model_tests) to run.py CATEGORIES (guarded behind a --model flag, like behavior_balance).
